===================
=== bd1991-07-24_groton.txt
===================
===================
===================
Taper: bw

Source: cassette master > audio disks > (dBpowerAMP set to compression level 6) flac

This a slightly altered version of LB-5428:
removed silence at beg and end of d1, added fade-in and fade-out
removed silence at beg of d2, added fade-in
removed silence after d2t4 and beg of d2t5(tape-flip?)
removed gap after d2t8 and silence at end of d2

then burned to cd-r. This is now ripped with eac in secure mode

CD1

1 New Morning 2 I'll Remember You 3 Maggie's Farm 4 Shelter From The Storm 5 Gotta Serve Somebody 6 Wiggle Wiggle 7 I Don't Believe You 
8 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 


CD2

1 Trail Of The Buffalo (acoustic) 2 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic w band) 3 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band) 
4 Girl From The North Country (acoustic w band) 5 Folsom Prison Blues 6 Everything Is Broken 7 Simple Twist Of Fate 
8 Highway 61 Revisited 9 Lenny Bruce 10 Ballad Of A Thin Man 



Note: This is also a close eac match on d2t4
